blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,051 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 20.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 13" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
